'''sachudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doccie|doccie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doccie|doccie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sachudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæchidith|sæchidith]] || [[word:sæchidij|sæchidij]] || [[word:sæchidish|sæchidish]] || [[word:sæchidi|sæchidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sachuchuduth|sachuchuduth]] || [[word:sachuchuduj|sachuchuduj]] || [[word:sachuchudush|sachuchudush]] || [[word:sachuchudu|sachuchudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sachuduth|sachuduth]] || [[word:sachuduj|sachuduj]] || [[word:sachudush|sachudush]] || [[word:sachudu|sachudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sachufduth|sachufduth]] || [[word:sachufduj|sachufduj]] || [[word:sachufdush|sachufdush]] || [[word:sachufduf|sachufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sachuduthu|sachuduthu]] || [[word:sachuduju|sachuduju]] || [[word:sachudushu|sachudushu]] || [[word:sachuduku|sachuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sachuduth|sachuduth]] || [[word:sachuduj|sachuduj]] || [[word:sachudush|sachudush]] || [[word:sachudu|sachudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sachuduthul|sachuduthul]] || [[word:sachudujul|sachudujul]] || [[word:sachudushul|sachudushul]] || [[word:sachudukul|sachudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sachuduthuthu|sachuduthuthu]] || [[word:sachudujuju|sachudujuju]] || [[word:sachudushushu|sachudushushu]] || [[word:sachuduku|sachuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sachuduthun|sachuduthun]] || [[word:sachudujun|sachudujun]] || [[word:sachudushun|sachudushun]] || [[word:sachudukun|sachudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sachuduthuoro|sachuduthuoro]] || [[word:sachudujuoro|sachudujuoro]] || [[word:sachudushuoro|sachudushuoro]] || [[word:sachudukuoro|sachudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
